title: The Ant and the Grasshopper
content:
One summer day, a grasshopper was hopping about.

He was singing and dancing in the sun.

An ant walked by, carrying a big piece of corn.

"Come play with me!" said the grasshopper.

"I cannot," said the ant. "I am storing food for winter."

"Why worry about winter?" laughed the grasshopper. "There is plenty of food now!"

The ant kept working. She stored corn and grain all summer long.

The grasshopper played and sang every day.

Then winter came. The ground was covered with snow.

The grasshopper had no food. He was very hungry and cold.

He went to the ant's house.

"Please give me some food," he begged.

"What did you do all summer?" asked the ant.

"I sang and played," said the grasshopper.

"Then sing and dance to keep warm now," said the ant.

The grasshopper learned an important lesson.

It is best to prepare for the days ahead.

The End.

author: Aesop
